subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God Who hath created all created things through His Word, and hath sent unto them His Messengers, and hath caused to descend upon them His Books [3.5s]... ...Hear thou Me once again! God is well pleased with thee, as a token of His grace and a sign of His mercy. He hath made thee to be His companion in every one of His worlds
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی خلق الخلق بکلمه من عنده و ارسل الیهم الرسل و انزل علیهم الکتب
subcodes.subjects: @eulogies; reminiscences, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @visitation Tablets, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
